tagline: Now available as a Databricks-hosted model for enhanced AI capabilities.
what_it_does: The Zhipu AI GLM 5.2 is a mixture of experts (MoE) model that supports a context window of up to 1 million tokens. It is optimized for tasks requiring long-horizon reasoning, coding, and agentic tool use. Users can access this model through the Foundation Model APIs, enabling integration into various applications.
why_it_matters: This update allows organizations to leverage advanced AI capabilities for complex tasks, enhancing productivity and innovation. By supporting a larger context window, businesses can improve the quality and relevance of AI-generated outputs, leading to better decision-making and operational efficiency.
plain_summary: Zhipu AI GLM 5.2 is now available as a hosted model on Databricks, offering advanced AI capabilities.

capabilities.title: Large Context Window
capabilities.desc: Supports a context window of up to 1 million tokens for comprehensive input handling.

capabilities.title: Optimized for Reasoning
capabilities.desc: Designed for long-horizon reasoning tasks, enhancing the model's effectiveness in complex scenarios.

capabilities.title: Coding Support
capabilities.desc: Facilitates coding tasks, making it suitable for software development and automation.

capabilities.title: Agentic Tool Use
capabilities.desc: Enables the model to perform tasks that require interaction with external tools and systems.

key_takeaway: The introduction of Zhipu AI GLM 5.2 as a Databricks-hosted model significantly enhances the platform's AI capabilities, enabling businesses to tackle complex tasks more effectively.
